3246990.name: Encave
3246990.description:
In Encave, YOU are an employee of Encave Corporation, a cold and clinical biotech megacorp specializing in manufacturing bioweapons. Deep underground in a product-termination facility known as the Killroom 305, the player must destroy waves of rejected “products” — horrific, Lovecraft-inspired creatures. Players BUILD and UPGRADE a custom KILLROOM with TRAPS, MINES, TURRETS, WALLS, and BARRICADES to handle increasingly difficult waves.

Encave is a hybrid FPS-tower-defense game where players build customizable killrooms to eliminate waves of corporate bioweapon rejects. With a fully destructible environment, strategic base construction, and escalating Lovecraftian threats, Encave delivers a unique blend of action, strategy, and dark humor for PC players on Steam.

These features are actively being developed, and we can’t wait to share more updates soon!
3246990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
